name: Used In tab is visible only for Component parts
steps:
Given a part 'Resistor 10k' is marked as 'Component' and is included in the BOM of 'PCB Assembly v1' and 'PCB Assembly v2'
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Resistor 10k' and clicks the 'Used In' tab
Then the Used In table shows 'PCB Assembly v1' and 'PCB Assembly v2'
